short: Watch the gap between two breaths
chapter: 3. Breath – A Bridge to the Universe
sutra: Radiant one, this experience may dawn between two breaths. After breath comes in (down) and just before turning up (out) – the beneficence.

short: Watch the turning point between two breaths
chapter: 3. Breath – A Bridge to the Universe
sutra: As breath turns from down to up, and again as breath curves from up to down – through both these turns, realize.

short: Watch the fusion point of two breaths
chapter: 3. Breath – A Bridge to the Universe
sutra: Or, whenever in-breath and out-breath fuse, at this instant touch the energy-less, energy-filled center.

chapter: 3. Breath – A Bridge to the Universe
sutra: Or, when breath is all out (up) and stopped of itself, or all in (down) and stopped – in such universal pause, one’s small self vanishes. This is difficult only for the impure.

short: Focus your attention on the third eye
sutra: Attention between eyebrows, let mind be before thought. Let form fill with breath essence to the top of the head and there shower as light.

short: Focus on the gap during your daily activities
sutra: When in worldly activity, keep attention between two breaths, and so practicing, in a few days be born anew.

short: A technique to be aware in dreams
sutra: With intangible breath in center of forehead, as this reaches heart at the moment of sleep, have direction over dreams and over death itself.

short: Watch the turning point with devotion
sutra: With utmost devotion, center on the two junctions of breath and know the knower.

short: Lie down as dead. Stare without blinking. Suck something and become the sucking.
sutra: Lie down as dead. Enraged in wrath, stay so. Or stare without moving an eyelash. Or suck something and become the sucking.

chapter: 7. Techniques to Put You at Ease
sutra: While being caressed, sweet princess, enter the caress as everlasting life.

chapter: 7. Techniques to Put You at Ease
sutra: Stop the doors of the senses when feeling the creeping of an ant. Then.

chapter: 7. Techniques to Put You at Ease
sutra: When on a bed or a seat, let yourself become weightless, beyond mind.

Or, imagine the five-colored circles of the peacock tail to be your five senses in illimitable space. Now let their beauty melt within. Similarly, at any point in space or on a wall – until the point dissolves. Then your wish for another comes true.

short: Put your awareness on your spine
sutra: Place your whole attention in the nerve, delicate as the lotus thread, in the center of your spinal column. In such be transformed.

short: Close all the openings of your head
sutra: Closing the seven openings of the head with your hands, a space between your eyes becomes all inclusive.

short: Absorb the senses in your heart
sutra: Blessed one, as senses are absorbed in the heart, reach the center of the lotus.

short: Do not choose, keep in the middle
sutra: Unminding mind, keep in the middle – until.
Look lovingly at some object. Do not go to another object. Here in the middle of the object – the blessing.
Without support for feet or hands, sit only on the buttocks. Suddenly, the centering.
In a moving vehicle, by rhythmically swaying, experience. Or in a still vehicle, by letting yourself swing in slowing invisible circles.

short: Concentrate on a pain in your body
sutra: Pierce some part of your nectar-filled form with a pin, and gently enter the piercing and attain to the inner purity.

chapter: 15. Seeing the Past as a Dream
sutra: Let attention be at a place where you are seeing some past happening, and even your form, having lost its present characteristics, is transformed.

short: Feel an object and become it
chapter: 15. Seeing the Past as a Dream
sutra: Feel an object before you. Feel the absence of all other objects but this one. Then, leaving aside the object-feeling and the absence-feeling, realize.

chapter: 15. Seeing the Past as a Dream
sutra: When a mood against someone or for someone arises, do not place it on the person in question, but remain centered.
Just as you have the impulse to do something, stop.
When some desire comes, consider it. Then, suddenly, quit it.

short: Exhaust yourself and drop to the ground
sutra: Roam about until exhausted and then, dropping to the ground, in this dropping be whole.

chapter:
19. A Technique for the Intellectual and a Technique for the Feeling
Type
sutra: Suppose you are gradually being deprived of strength or of knowledge. At the instant of deprivation, transcend.

chapter:
19. A Technique for the Intellectual and a Technique for the Feeling
Type
sutra: Devotion frees.

short: Close the eyes and stop their movement
sutra: Eyes closed, see your inner being in detail. Thus see your true nature.

short: Look at an object as a whole
sutra: Look upon a bowl without seeing the sides or the material. In a few moments become aware.

short: Look at an object as if for the first time
sutra: See as if for the first time a beauteous person or an ordinary object.
Simply by looking into the blue sky beyond clouds, the serenity.
Listen while the ultimate mystical teaching is imparted. Eyes still, without blinking, at once become absolutely free.
At the edge of a deep well look steadily into its depths until – the wondrousness.
Look upon some object, then slowly withdraw your sight from it, then slowly withdraw your thought from it. Then.

chapter: 25. From Words to Pure Words to Being
sutra: Devi, imagine the Sanskrit letters in these honey-filled foci of awareness, first as letters, then more subtly as sounds, then as most subtle feeling. Then, leaving them aside, be free.

short: Feel yourself in the center of sounds
chapter: 25. From Words to Pure Words to Being
sutra: Bathe in the center of sound, as in the continuous sound of a waterfall. Or, by putting the fingers in the ears, hear the sound of sounds.

short: Intone a sound and become it
sutra: Intone a sound, as aum, slowly. As sound enters soundfulness, so do you.
In the beginning and gradual refinement of the sound of any letter, awake.
While listening to stringed instruments, hear their composite central sound; thus omnipresence.

short: Use sound as a passage toward feeling
chapter: 29. Methods for the Dropping of Mind
sutra: Intone a sound audibly, then less and less audibly as feeling deepens into this silent harmony.

short: Focus your mind on the tongue
chapter: 29. Methods for the Dropping of Mind
sutra: With mouth slightly open, keep mind in the middle of the tongue. Or, as breath comes silently in, feel the sound “hh.”

short: A method for those with a sensitive ear
chapter: 29. Methods for the Dropping of Mind
sutra: Center on the sound “aum” without any “a” or “m.”
Silently intone a word ending in “ah.” Then in the “hh,” effortlessly, the spontaneity.
Stopping ears by pressing and the rectum by contracting, enter the sound.

short: Use your name as a mantra
sutra: Enter the sound of your name and, through this sound, all sounds.

short: In the sex act, do not seek the release
chapter: 33. The Spirituality of the Tantric Sex Act
sutra: At the start of sexual union keep attentive on the fire in the beginning, and so continuing, avoid the embers in the end.

chapter: 33. The Spirituality of the Tantric Sex Act
sutra: When in such embrace your senses are shaken as leaves, enter this shaking.

chapter: 33. The Spirituality of the Tantric Sex Act
sutra: Even remembering union, without the embrace, transformation.

chapter: 33. The Spirituality of the Tantric Sex Act
sutra: On joyously seeing a long absent friend, permeate this joy.

chapter: 33. The Spirituality of the Tantric Sex Act
sutra: When eating or drinking, become the taste of food or drink, and be filled.
Oh lotus-eyed one, sweet of touch, when singing, seeing, tasting, be aware you are and discover the ever-living.
Wherever satisfaction is found, in whatever act, actualize this.

short: Be aware of the gap between waking and sleep
sutra: At the point of sleep, when the sleep has not yet come and the external wakefulness vanishes, at this point being is revealed.

short: Think of the world as an illusion
sutra: Illusions deceive, colors circumscribe, even divisibles are indivisible.

chapter: 37. Techniques to Witness the Flux-like Film of Life
sutra: In moods of extreme desire, be undisturbed.

short: See the world as a drama
chapter: 37. Techniques to Witness the Flux-like Film of Life
sutra: This so-called universe appears as a juggling, a picture show. To be happy, look upon it so.

short: Stay in the middle between two polarities
chapter: 37. Techniques to Witness the Flux-like Film of Life
sutra: Oh beloved, put attention neither on pleasure nor on pain, but between these.

chapter: 37. Techniques to Witness the Flux-like Film of Life
sutra: Objects and desires exist in me as in others. So accepting, let them be transformed.

chapter: 39. From the Wave to the Cosmic Ocean
sutra: As waves come with water and flames with fire, so the universal waves with us.

short: Use mind as the door to meditation
chapter: 39. From the Wave to the Cosmic Ocean
sutra: Wherever your mind is wandering, internally or externally, at this very place, this.

chapter: 39. From the Wave to the Cosmic Ocean
sutra: When vividly aware through some particular sense, keep in the awareness.

short: At the beginning of a strong sensation, be aware
chapter: 41. Tantric Methods for Awareness and NonJudgment
sutra: At the start of sneezing, during fright, in anxiety, above a chasm, flying in battle, in extreme curiosity, at the beginning of hunger, at the end of hunger, be uninterruptedly aware.

chapter: 41. Tantric Methods for Awareness and NonJudgment
sutra: The purity of other teachings is an impurity to us. In reality, know nothing as pure or impure.

short: Be aware of that which never changes in you
chapter: 43. Finding the Changeless through the Changing
sutra: Be the unsame same to friend as to stranger, in honor and dishonor.

chapter: 43. Finding the Changeless through the Changing
sutra: Here is the sphere of change, change, change. Through change consume change.
As a hen mothers her chicks, mother particular knowings, particular doings, in reality.

Since, in truth, bondage and freedom are relative, these words are only for those terrified with the universe. This universe is a reflection of minds. As you see many suns in water from one sun, so see bondage and liberation.

short: Visualize light rays rising up your spine
sutra: Consider your essence as light rays from center to center up the vertebrae, and so rises “livingness” in you.

short: Visualize a spark of light jumping from one chakra to the next
sutra: Or in the spaces between, feel this as lightning.

short: Feel the presence of the ever-living existence
sutra: Feel the cosmos as a translucent ever-living presence.

short: Become the clarity of the cloudless sky
sutra: In summer when you see the entire sky endlessly clear enter such clarity.

short: Feel the whole universe in your head
sutra: Shakti, see all space as if already absorbed in your own head in the brilliance.
Waking, sleeping, dreaming, know you as light.
In rain during a black night enter that blackness as the form of forms.
When a moonless rainy night is not present, close eyes and find blackness before you. Opening eyes, see blackness. So faults disappear forever.
Wherever your attention alights, at this very point, experience.
Focus on fire rising through your form from the toes up until the body burns to ashes but not you.
Meditate on the make-believe world as burning to ashes and become being above human.
As subjectively, letters flow into words and words into sentences, and as, objectively, circles flow into worlds and worlds into principles, find at last these converging in your being.
Feel: my thought, I-ness, internal organs – me.

short: Change your focus to the gaps
sutra: Before desire and before knowing, how can I say I am? Consider. Dissolve in the beauty.
Toss attachment for body aside, realizing I am everywhere. One who is everywhere is joyous.
Thinking no thing will limited-self unlimit.
Suppose you contemplate something beyond perception, beyond grasping, beyond not being. – you.
I am existing. This is mine. This is this. Oh beloved, even in such know illimitably.

short: Know the knower and the known
chapter: 61. Techniques to Become One with the Whole
sutra: Each thing is perceived through knowing. The self shines in space through knowing. Perceive one being as knower and known.

chapter: 61. Techniques to Become One with the Whole
sutra: Beloved, at this moment let, mind, knowing, breath, form, be included.
Touching eyeballs as a feather, lightness between them opens into heart and there permeates the cosmos.
Kind Devi, enter etheric presence pervading far above and below your form.

short: Be aware of the moments of no-thought
sutra: Put mind-stuff in such inexpressible fineness above, below and in your heart.
Consider any area of your present form as limitlessly spacious.
Feel your substance, bones, flesh, blood, saturated with the cosmic essence.

short: Concentrate on the breasts, or on the root of the penis
sutra: Feel the fine qualities of creativity permeating your breasts’ and assuming delicate configurations.
Abide in some place endlessly spacious, clear of trees, hills, habitations. Thence comes the end of mind pressures.

short: Fill endless space with your bliss body
sutra: Consider the plenum to be your own body of bliss.

short: Feel the peace in your heart
sutra: In any position gradually pervade an area between the armpits into great peace.
Feel yourself as pervading all directions, far, near.
The appreciation of objects and subjects is the same for an enlightened as for an unenlightened person. The former has one greatness: he remains in the subjective mood, not lost in things.
Believe omniscient, omnipotent, pervading.
Image spirit simultaneously within and around you until the entire universe spiritualizes.
With your entire consciousness in the very start of desire, of knowing, know.
O Shakti, each particular perception is limited, disappearing in omnipotence.
In truth forms are inseparate. Inseparate are omnipresent being and your own form. Realize each as made of this consciousness.
Feel the consciousness of each person as your own consciousness. So, leaving aside concern for self, become each being.
This consciousness exists as each being, and nothing else exists.
This consciousness is the spirit of guidance of each one. Be this one.
Suppose your passive form to be an empty room with walls of skin – empty.
Gracious one, play. The universe is an empty shell wherein your mind frolics infinitely.
Sweet hearted one, meditate on knowing and not-knowing, existing and not-existing. Then leave both aside that you may be.
Enter space, supportless, eternal, still.
